title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 10 - 2017: Rode 25 miles, ran 4.32 miles, swam 400 meters

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps his April 10, 2017 day in Boulder: a ~25-mile bike ride (commute to work plus a trip downtown to buy a phone belt at a running store), a 4.34-mile run, and a 400-meter swim. He covers audio troubles with his MP3 player while swimming, using fins without hand paddles, and plans to start daily body-shot photos to track his weight loss.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: harder than expected once he stopped relying on fins and actually pushed
needs music to stay motivated — Bible audio didn't work due to splashing
wants to do daily body-shot photos to visibly document getting slimmer
wants to bring a small tripod next time to film himself riding and running
